title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-featured e-commerce platform built with React and Node.js. Complete with product catalog, shopping cart, and payment integration.

title: Mobile Weather App
description: A beautiful weather application for iOS and Android. Real-time weather updates, forecasts, and location-based features.

title: Design System UI Kit
description: Comprehensive design system and UI component library for modern web applications. Fully documented and open source.

title: RESTful API Server
description: Robust backend API server with authentication, authorization, and database management. Built with Express.js and PostgreSQL.

title: Portfolio Website
description: Modern, responsive portfolio website showcasing projects and skills. Built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

title: Analytics Dashboard
description: Real-time analytics dashboard with interactive charts and data visualization. Built with Vue.js and D3.js.
